feedback_comments: It feels like the system is designed to stop people geting appointments.

I waited over a month to speak to a GP about ongoing pain. When I finally had the appointment it lasted less than ten minutes and I was told to take painkillers again, which I already said were not working. I left feeling frustrated and not taken seriously at all.

Every time I call at 8am the line is engaged and when I do get through im told there are no appointments left. They email me at steve.howe@ex.com. This has been happening for weeks and its exhausting.
English is not my first language cal me 44999890 and they speak very fast. I dont feel supported and I leave unsure what I am ment to do next.
The surgery in Clifton called me by my surname Johnson, even though I asked them to call me Irfan.
The surgery in March called me and June was very rude when speaking to me.
English is not my first language call me at 07819996666 and they speak very fast. I dont feel supported and I leave unsure what I am ment to do next.
